usage_sections: Installation: > [!WARNING] > Packages for ParrotOS and Ubuntu 24.04, maintained by a third party, appear to be broken. > Users of these systems should defer to uv/pipx/pip or Docker. | Method | Notes | | - | - | | pipx install sherlock-project | pip or uv may be used in place of pipx | | docke

arguments.description: Time (in seconds) to wait for response to requests (Default: 60)

arguments.description: Skip TLS verification (lab use only).

arguments.description: Emit JSON output (machine-readable).

arguments.description: Suppress non-error output.

arguments.description: Print what would be done without making any changes.

arguments.description: Skip confirmation prompts (use with care).

arguments.name: --force
arguments.description: Force the action even if a safety check would block it.

arguments.name: --no-banner
arguments.description: Suppress banner / tool-name output.

arguments.name: --capture
arguments.description: Capture mode: write packets to a pcap file.

chain_examples.note: Shares attack_surface+phase_hint+tag with rasta-mouse/Sherlock (score=10); pair in the chain planner.
Shares attack_surface+phase_hint+tag with zynon/LdapRelayScan (score=9); pair in the chain planner.
Shares attack_surface+phase_hint+tag with zodiacon/HookHunter (score=9); pair in the chain planner.
Phase 3: same attack_surface=['web'] and phase_hint='any'; this entry chains with adjacent tools in the same family. The full set of siblings is enumerated by the catalog search index.
Phase 4: same attack_surface=['web'] and phase_hint='any'; this entry chains with adjacent tools in the same family. The full set of siblings is enumerated by the catalog search index.
Phase 5: same attack_surface=['web'] and phase_hint='any'; this entry chains with adjacent tools in the same family. The full set of siblings is enumerated by the catalog search index.

documentation.when_to_use: Use during the 'any' phase against surfaces [web] in the osint category. Fits when the engagement needs: Hunt down social media accounts by username across 400+ social networks.
documentation.why_to_use: Prefer this tool based on upstream description: Hunt down social media accounts by username across 400+ social networks.
documentation.how_to_use: Run the primary entrypoint as shown in upstream docs, e.g. `sherlock --help`. Further invocations from upstream: `USERNAMES [USERNAMES ...]`; `Sherlock: Find Usernames Across Social Networks (Version 0.16.0)`. Hunt down social media accounts by username across 400+ social networks.

name: sherlock

trust.warning: Attribution / index entry only. The operator must audit the code, the README, the license, and the releases before invoking. Phase 5 — entry is auto-generated from the operator's curated fetch list; no automated enrichment yet.
